requirement_topic.en: EMC and China GB Evidence Mapping

summary.en: Thailand BESS projects may require EMC evidence for PCS, BMS, controls, meters, communications equipment, and auxiliary electrical equipment through TIS, IEC, utility, owner, or tender specifications. The relevant EMC standard should be confirmed by equipment type and installation environment; do not assume one EMC report covers the complete BESS container.
summary.zh: 泰国BESS项目可能通过TIS、IEC、电网公司、业主或招标规格要求PCS、BMS、控制器、仪表、通信设备及辅助电气设备的EMC证据。相关EMC标准应按设备类型和安装环境确认；不应假定一份EMC报告覆盖整个BESS集装箱。
summary.zht: 泰國BESS項目可能通過TIS、IEC、電網公司、業主或招標規格要求PCS、BMS、控制器、儀表、通信設備及輔助電氣設備的EMC證據。相關EMC標準應按設備類型和安裝環境確認；不應假定一份EMC報告覆蓋整個BESS集裝箱。

standards_or_laws: TISI Thai Industrial Standards catalogue and compulsory standards list
Project EMC and utility power-quality specifications

summary.en: China BESS files often include GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558, PCS reports, and EMC reports for subassemblies. Those documents should be mapped to Thai equipment-level EMC and grid-quality requirements rather than presented as automatic Thai acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国BESS资料包常包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558、PCS报告及子组件EMC报告。这些文件应映射至泰国设备级EMC和电能质量要求，而不应作为泰国自动接受依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS資料包常包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558、PCS報告及子組件EMC報告。這些文件應映射至泰國設備級EMC和電能品質要求，而不應作為泰國自動接受依據。

gap.en: The gap is equipment boundary and environment. Exporters should identify which subassemblies are placed on the Thai market, which are imported as parts of a project, which EMC standards are cited by the tender or utility, and whether site-level harmonic, flicker, earthing, surge, and communication-immunity evidence is required.
gap.zh: 差距在设备边界和使用环境。出口商应识别哪些子组件在泰国投放市场，哪些作为项目部件进口，招标或电网公司引用哪些EMC标准，以及是否需要现场级谐波、闪变、接地、浪涌和通信抗扰度证据。
gap.zht: 差距在設備邊界和使用環境。出口商應識別哪些子組件在泰國投放市場，哪些作為項目部件進口，招標或電網公司引用哪些EMC標準，以及是否需要現場級諧波、閃變、接地、突波和通信抗擾度證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where an applicable Thai compulsory standard, utility condition, permit, contract, or tender requires EMC compliance for the equipment or project; otherwise project/customer-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory, recommended, or project-specific depending on the Chinese product category, GB/GB-T standard, and grid approval route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558 evidence is useful for comparison, but Thai EMC and power-quality acceptance must be checked against the exact equipment boundary and project instrument.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558证据可用于对照，但泰国EMC和电能质量接受应按准确设备边界及项目文件核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558證據可用於對照，但泰國EMC和電能品質接受應按準確設備邊界及項目文件核查。
